formulas.formula: Revenue minus Cost of revenue equals Gross profit
Research and development plus Sales, general and administrative plus Acquisition termination cost equals Total operating expenses
formulas.operation: Research and development + Sales, general and administrative + Acquisition termination cost

formulas.formula: Gross profit minus Total operating expenses equals Operating income
Interest income minus Interest expense plus Other, net equals Other income (expense), net
formulas.operation: Interest income - Interest expense + Other, net

formulas.formula: Operating income plus Other income (expense), net equals Income before income tax
Income before income tax minus Income tax expense (benefit) equals Net income
formulas.operation: Income before income tax - Income tax expense (benefit)

SBC expense by function disclosed in Note 4; included within cost of revenue and operating expense line items on the income statement but not presented as a separate line

formulas.formula: Cash and cash equivalents plus Marketable securities plus Accounts receivable net plus Inventories plus Prepaid expenses and other current assets equals Total current assets
components: Prepaid expenses and other current assets
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents + Marketable securities + Accounts receivable, net + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets

formulas.formula: Total current assets plus Property and equipment net plus Operating lease assets plus Goodwill plus Intangible assets net plus Deferred income tax assets plus Other assets equals Total assets
formulas.operation: Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Other assets

formulas.formula: Accounts payable plus Accrued and other current liabilities plus Short-term debt equals Total current liabilities
formulas.operation: Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Short-term debt

formulas.formula: Total current liabilities plus Long-term debt plus Long-term operating lease liabilities plus Other long-term liabilities equals Total liabilities
formulas.operation: Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Long-term operating lease liabilities + Other long-term liabilities

formulas.formula: Preferred stock plus Common stock plus Additional paid-in capital plus Accumulated other comprehensive loss plus Retained earnings equals Total shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Preferred stock + Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive loss + Retained earnings

formulas.formula: Total liabilities plus Total shareholders equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity

line_items.mapping_reason: HTML text 'Deferred income taxes' in adjustments, shown in parentheses. XBRL uses sign='-1' giving -1881 and -985. Tagged name='us-gaap:DeferredIncomeTaxExpenseBenefit' in contexts c-1 and c-5

line_items.label: Other
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML text 'Other' in adjustments, FY2024 shown in parentheses (-102). XBRL: FY2024 = 102 with no sign flip but HTML shows parentheses; FY2023 uses sign='-1' giving 18 as a negative addback. Tagged name='us-gaap:OtherNoncashIncomeExpense'

line_items.label: Accounts receivable
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML text 'Accounts receivable' under changes in operating assets and liabilities, shown in parentheses (uses cash). XBRL concept us-gaap:IncreaseDecreaseInAccountsReceivable represents increase in AR as use of cash (positive value = use). HTML shows in parentheses per convention

line_items.label: Inventories
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML text 'Inventories' under changes in operating assets. FY2024 shows positive (inventory decrease = source of cash), FY2023 shows negative (inventory increase = use of cash). XBRL uses sign='-1' for FY2024 giving -861. Tagged name='us-gaap:IncreaseDecreaseInInventories'

line_items.label: Prepaid expenses and other assets
line_items.mapping_reason: HTML text 'Prepaid expenses and other assets' in changes section, shown in parentheses. XBRL positive value represents increase in assets (use of cash). Tagged name='us-gaap:IncreaseDecreaseInPrepaidDeferredExpenseAndOtherAssets'

formulas.formula: Net income plus non-cash adjustments plus changes in working capital equals Net cash provided by operating activities
components: (Gains) losses on investments in non-affiliates, net
Net cash provided by operating activities
formulas.operation: Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization + (Gains) losses on investments in non-affiliates, net + Deferred income taxes + Acquisition termination cost + Other - Accounts receivable - Inventories - Prepaid expenses and other assets + Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Other long-term liabilities
formulas.result_label: Net cash provided by operating activities

formulas.formula: Proceeds from maturities plus Proceeds from sales minus Purchases of marketable securities minus Purchases of PP&E minus Acquisitions minus Investments and other equals Net cash from investing
components: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of marketable securities
Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of marketable securities - Purchases of marketable securities - Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets - Acquisitions, net of cash acquired - Investments and other, net
formulas.result_label: Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities

formulas.formula: Proceeds from stock plans minus Repurchases minus Debt repayment minus Tax withholding minus Dividends minus Financed PP&E plus Other equals Net cash from financing
components: Proceeds related to employee stock plans
Payments related to repurchases of common stock
Payments related to tax on restricted stock units
Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds related to employee stock plans - Payments related to repurchases of common stock - Repayment of debt - Payments related to tax on restricted stock units - Dividends paid - Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets + Other
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in financing activities

formulas.formula: Net cash from operating plus Net cash from investing plus Net cash from financing equals Change in cash
components: Net cash provided by operating activities
Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities
Net cash used in financing activities
Change in cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash
formulas.operation: Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash provided by (used in) investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.result_label: Change in cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash

formulas.formula: Beginning cash plus Change in cash equals Ending cash
components: Cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash at beginning of period
Change in cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash
Cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash at end of period
formulas.operation: Cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash at beginning of period + Change in cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash
formulas.result_label: Cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash at end of period

formulas.formula: Cash and cash equivalents plus Restricted cash equals Total cash equivalents and restricted cash
components: Restricted cash, included in prepaid expenses and other current assets
Total cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents (reconciliation) + Restricted cash, included in prepaid expenses and other current assets
formulas.result_label: Total cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash

cross_statement_checks.check: Net income on IS matches Net income starting CF
Ending cash on CF matches Cash on BS (current period July 30, 2023) - note CF uses restricted cash total 5882 vs BS cash only 5783
Ending cash and restricted cash on CF (5882) equals Cash on BS (5783) plus Restricted cash (99)
Beginning cash on CF matches Cash on BS (prior period Jan 29, 2023) - CF beginning = 3389, BS Jan 29 = 3389 (no restricted cash at Jan 29)
Retained earnings change on BS equals Net income minus Dividends minus Share repurchases charged to retained earnings

operating_leases.current_location: Current portion of 208 million is included within Accrued and other current liabilities on balance sheet face (us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent = 208 per Note 10 and balance sheet note). Non-current of 1041 is shown separately as Long-term operating lease liabilities on balance sheet face.

components.label: Short-term debt (current portion of long-term debt - 0.584% Notes Due 2024)

interest_expense.source: Gross interest expense of 131 million (us-gaap:InterestExpense for six months ended July 30, 2023) and interest income of 338 million (us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest) are presented as separate line items on the income statement. No note breakout of gross vs net was needed as they are already separate.

corrected_components.label: (Gains) losses on investments in non-affiliates, net

items_corrected: Accounts receivable: sign corrected from +3239 to -3239 (increase in AR is a use of cash)
Inventories: sign corrected from -861 to +861 (decrease in inventory is a source of cash)
Prepaid expenses and other assets: sign corrected from +592 to -592 (increase in prepaid is a use of cash)

corrected_components.label: Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of marketable securities
Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets
Proceeds related to employee stock plans
Payments related to repurchases of common stock
Payments related to tax on restricted stock units
Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets

formula_checks.formula: Revenue minus Cost of revenue equals Gross profit
Research and development plus Sales, general and administrative plus Acquisition termination cost equals Total operating expenses
Gross profit minus Total operating expenses equals Operating income
Interest income minus Interest expense plus Other, net equals Other income (expense), net
Operating income plus Other income (expense), net equals Income before income tax
Income before income tax minus Income tax expense (benefit) equals Net income
Cash and cash equivalents plus Marketable securities plus Accounts receivable net plus Inventories plus Prepaid expenses and other current assets equals Total current assets
Total current assets plus Property and equipment net plus Operating lease assets plus Goodwill plus Intangible assets net plus Deferred income tax assets plus Other assets equals Total assets
Accounts payable plus Accrued and other current liabilities plus Short-term debt equals Total current liabilities
Total current liabilities plus Long-term debt plus Long-term operating lease liabilities plus Other long-term liabilities equals Total liabilities
Preferred stock plus Common stock plus Additional paid-in capital plus Accumulated other comprehensive loss plus Retained earnings equals Total shareholders equity
Total liabilities plus Total shareholders equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Net income plus non-cash adjustments plus changes in working capital equals Net cash provided by operating activities
Proceeds from maturities plus Proceeds from sales minus Purchases of marketable securities minus Purchases of PP&E minus Acquisitions minus Investments and other equals Net cash from investing
Proceeds from stock plans minus Repurchases minus Debt repayment minus Tax withholding minus Dividends minus Financed PP&E plus Other equals Net cash from financing
Net cash from operating plus Net cash from investing plus Net cash from financing equals Change in cash
Beginning cash plus Change in cash equals Ending cash
Cash and cash equivalents plus Restricted cash equals Total cash equivalents and restricted cash
